data.title: House data model — shared data for all 6 houses

data.body: Create shared TypeScript data file defining all 6 houses: Co-Living, Events, Campus, New Liberal Arts, Political Club, Lab. Each house: name, slug, color (accent), quote, leaders (name + avatar + role), 2-3 paragraph description, external links. Pull content from Fractal OS synthesis doc. Leader roster from Fractal OS. This data feeds house banners, house pages, and directory.

UPDATED: Pull all content from Fractal OS synthesis doc. Quotes: find one quote per house aligned with its identity. Leaders: already defined in Fractal OS — extract names, roles, house assignments. Descriptions: pull existing text for each sector. Colors: TBD by Jules — use placeholder values. Source: /Users/jules/Documents/dev/fractal-os/notes/2026-03-28-fractal-nyc-website-synthesis.md

REVIEW FAIL — implementation-level rework needed.

BUG FOUND: The Lab house has route: '/research-writing' but it should be route: '/lab'.

Evidence:
- FRAC-24 App.tsx routes Lab to /lab
- FRAC-25 Navbar links Lab to /lab  
- FRAC-26 houses.ts Lab entry: slug: 'lab', route: '/research-writing' <-- MISMATCH

This will cause a broken link when downstream components use house.route for navigation — clicking Lab in any component that reads from HOUSES will navigate to /research-writing which no longer exists (FRAC-24 removed it).

Fix required: In src/data/houses.ts, change the Lab house route from '/research-writing' to '/lab'.

All other acceptance criteria pass:
1. House and Person types: defined with full interfaces (ExternalLink, Person, House). Confirmed.
2. All 6 houses with real descriptions from Fractal OS synthesis (not placeholders). Confirmed — substantive multi-paragraph descriptions.
3. 8 key people: andrew, priya, liam, ivan, daniel, david, paris, crystal. All with roles and house associations. Confirmed.
4. Helper functions: getHouseBySlug, getPeopleByHouse, getHousesByPerson — all present and correctly implemented. Confirmed.
5. Colors distinct: #8B7355, #E07A5F, #457B9D, #1D3557, #CC2936, #6B4C9A — all unique. Confirmed.
6. TypeScript passes (in isolation). Confirmed.

Minor observations:
- Person entries for Priya, David, and Crystal lack last names — may be intentional for privacy, flagging for awareness.
- 'school' and 'forum' are used as house IDs in person.houses arrays, mapping to the School (New Liberal Arts) and Forum (Political Club) houses respectively — this is consistent within the data model.

REVIEW PASS (cycle 2). Fixed Lab route inline: /research-writing -> /lab. All 6 house routes now consistent with FRAC-24 App.tsx and FRAC-25 Navbar: /neighborhood, /events, /campus, /new-liberal-arts, /political-club, /lab. TypeScript passes. All acceptance criteria met.
